items.title: Viní Jr 'not yet' within Flamengo's means
items.summary: Flamengo do not "yet" have the financial means to lure Vinícius Júnior back to the club, according to its president Luiz Eduardo Baptista.

items.title: De Zerbi leaves Marseille after 5-0 loss to PSG
items.summary: Marseille head coach Roberto De Zerbi has left the club following their 5-0 defeat to Paris Saint Germain on Sunday.

items.title: Carrick hails 'unbelievable' Sesko goal to earn draw
items.summary: Michael Carrick hailed super-sub Benjamin Sesko's "unbelievable finish" after the striker's amazing last-gasp volley snatched Manchester United a 1-1 draw at West Ham United.

items.title: Tottenham sack Frank after 8 months in charge
items.summary: Thomas Frank has been sacked as Tottenham head coach, the club confirmed on Wednesday.

items.title: How Thomas Frank's Tottenham reign unravelled
items.summary: Thomas Frank's time at Spurs has come to an end -- where did it all gone wrong for the Dane in north London?

items.title: FC Bankzaken: 'Goed dat Sparta samenwerking Ajax heeft gestopt'
items.summary: In de serie FC Bankzaken bespreekt Tom Knipping samen met presentator Bart Frouws de financiën in het binnen- en buitenlandse voetbal. In deze aflevering gaan de heren dieper in op de financiële situatie van Sparta Rotterdam.

items.title: What went wrong for Frank?
items.summary: Thomas Frank's Tottenham spell is over after just eight months.

items.title: Scherpen en Ajax vallen op in lijstje van minste tegengoals in thuisduels
items.summary: Union Sint-Gillis ligt op koers om de Belgische titel te prolongeren en heeft dat mede te danken aan de weinige tegengoals in thuisduels: drie in twaalf wedstrijden. Kijkend naar de toptien beste competities in Europa volgens de UEFA-coëfficiëntenranking doet één club het dit seizoen beter dan keeper Kjell Scherpen en zijn teamgenoten. Ook Ajax is terug te vinden in het klassement.

items.title: Tirade De Rossi blijkt gegrond: scheidsrechtersbond erkent fout
items.summary: Daniele De Rossi wordt na afloop van Genoa-Napoli in het gelijk gesteld in zijn frustratie over de beslissende strafschop in blessuretijd. Namens de Italiaanse scheidsrechtersbond AIA heeft Dino Tommasi namelijk toegegeven dat de penalty nooit gegeven had mogen worden.

items.title: Toekomst van Tomasson junior ligt in Rotterdam
items.summary: Luca Dahl Tomasson blijft verbonden aan Feyenoord. De zeventienjarige middenvelder en uiteraard zoon van heeft zijn aflopende contract opengebroken en verlengd tot medio 2028.

items.title: Championship play-offs set for expansion next season ahead of EFL vote
items.summary: The Championship play-offs are likely to include six teams for the first time from next season, Sky Sports News understands.

items.title: Why Frank at Tottenham was a gamble that ended in bitter failure
items.summary: Thomas Frank's appointment by Tottenham was a gamble that ended in a storm of toxicity, writes Phil McNulty.

items.title: How much pressure is Slot really under at Liverpool?
items.summary: Liverpool have won just once in the Premier League in 2026 - so will they stick with Arne Slot, who took them to the title last season?

items.title: Tottenham latest: Frank sacked! What next for Spurs? Have your say...
Thomas Frank sacked by Tottenham after eight months as head coach
items.summary: Club five points above drop zone after Newcastle defeat Spurs have not won in the Premier League in 2026 Thomas Frank has been sacked by Tottenham, the final straw for the head coach coming on Tuesday when his team lost at home to Newcastle, leaving Spurs 16th in the Premier League, five points above the relegation zone. The Tottenham Hotspur Stadium crowd again rebelled against Frank, booing him and chanting that he would be sacked in the morning. Continue reading...

items.title: Tottenham sack head coach Frank
items.summary: Tottenham have sacked head coach Thomas Frank after less than eight months in charge.

items.title: Tottenham Hotspur neemt afscheid van manager Frank
items.summary: Tottenham Hotspur heeft woensdagochtend afscheid genomen van Thomas Frank. Door de aanhoudende tegenvallende prestaties was de Deense manager flink onder druk komen te staan. Inmiddels heeft de clubleiding ingegrepen.

items.title: The 'rabbit in headlights' now excelling for Man City
items.summary: Abdukodir Khusanov endured a nightmare debut for Manchester City but has since recovered to become a mainstay in the team.

items.title: Roberto De Zerbi leaves Marseille after PSG hammering and Champions League exit
items.summary: Marseille beaten 5-0 by PSG and 3-0 by Club Brugge De Zerbi joined as head coach in 2024 after Brighton exit Roberto De Zerbi has left Marseille in the wake of a 5-0 thrashing at the hands of Paris Saint-Germain. The nine-time French champions said on Wednesday that they had ended “their collaboration by mutual agreement.” The heavy loss Sunday at the Parc des Princes restored PSG’s two-point lead over Lens after 21 rounds, with Marseille fourth. De Zerbi’s team also endured an embarrassing 3-0 loss at Club Brugge two weeks ago that resulted in Marseille exiting the Champions League. Continue reading...

items.title: Has Milner's record become a problem for Brighton?
items.summary: James Milner is one game away from drawing level with Gareth Barry for most Premier League appearances, but has the record become a problem for Brighton?
